justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially queried for March 14th and 15th, 2027, when the user likely meant 2026, but quickly corrected to 2026 in the next turn.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered two available slots on June 9th, but when those were rejected, it only offered to check for June 10th without proactively suggesting other alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two check_availability calls in Turn 2, one for the exact time and another for the entire day, which could have been combined or optimized.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent's apology in Turn 3 for a "mistake in the previous response" felt a bit like exposing system internals, even though it was trying to be helpful.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by offering to check a new date, but it did not proactively offer a range of options when the initial suggestions were rejected.
